## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::DecimalsArrowLeft;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        DecimalsArrowLeft { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
numerical, decimal, decrease, less, fewer, precision, rounding, digits, fraction, float, number

## Categories
design, text, arrows, math
